title: Why TELEPATHY Isn't Taken Seriously By Modern Science
summary: This interview discusses why telepathy and other innate human abilities are not taken seriously by modern science. The conversation explores how society has come to dismiss those who believe in such phenomena, despite common experiences like 'telephone telepathy' being nearly universal.

key_claims.claim: Humans have allowed innate abilities like telepathy to fall into disuse and have come to despise those who believe such abilities exist
Telephone telepathy - knowing who is calling before answering - is a nearly universal human experience
Most people (nine out of ten) have experienced telephone telepathy but discount their own phenomenology due to scientific dogma
